der.oauth2:
erDiagram
    oauth2_provider_grant {
        bigint id PK
        character_varying code
        timestamp_with_time_zone expires
        character_varying redirect_uri
        text scope
        bigint application_id FK
        character_varying user_id FK
        timestamp_with_time_zone created
    }
    oauth2_provider_application {
        bigint id PK
        character_varying client_id
        text redirect_uris
        character_varying client_type
        character_varying authorization_grant_type
        character_varying client_secret
        character_varying name
        character_varying user_id FK
    }
    oauth2_provider_grant }o--|| oauth2_provider_application : "application_id"
der.pessoa:
erDiagram
    pessoa_pessoa {
        character_varying nome
        character_varying nome_social
        character_varying cpf PK
        character_varying sexo
        character_varying nome_pai
        character_varying nome_mae
        date data_nascimento
        timestamp_with_time_zone created_at
    }
    pessoa_contato {
        integer id PK
        character_varying email
        character_varying telefone
        timestamp_with_time_zone created_at
        timestamp_with_time_zone updated_at
        character_varying pessoa_id FK
        character_varying celular
        character_varying facebook
    }
    pessoa_fotos {
        integer id PK
        character_varying arquivo
        timestamp_with_time_zone created_at
        timestamp_with_time_zone updated_at
        character_varying pessoa_id FK
        boolean atual
    }
    pessoa_contato }o--|| pessoa_pessoa : "pessoa_id"
    pessoa_fotos }o--|| pessoa_pessoa : "pessoa_id"
der.rest:
erDiagram
    rest_framework_api_key_apikey {
        character_varying id PK
        timestamp_with_time_zone created
        character_varying name
        boolean revoked
        timestamp_with_time_zone expiry_date
        character_varying hashed_key
        character_varying prefix
    }
